bias.analyst: Four minutes from the day-type verdict and everything has converged: the pullback Theo wanted came and HELD above the broken resistance, price re-pressed to the morning's high - and most telling, the overhead wall has THINNED dramatically before contact, its defenders relocating higher. Yielding ground before a hit is the inverse of this morning's defense. If the verdict confirms an upward trend day, Theo takes the with-trend long on a confirmed break - measured target, front of the relocated wall, never through it.
bias.commentator: FOUR MINUTES from the whistle and what a build-up! The reset the manager demanded came perfectly - the side fell back, held their new line, and surged forward again. And LOOK at the away end: the big bus that's been parked all morning just REVERSED two rows up the pitch! They're conceding territory before contact! If the whistle confirms our game, the strikers finally come on - one clean confirmed break and we attack the near post. The bench is buzzing!

events.analyst: Theo Live is now public. From here on, session events appear in this feed with a delay - wins, losses, and the days we sit on our hands.
events.commentator: Welcome to the grounds! The gates are open for the first time. Pre-season record is on the board - including the losses. We hide nothing here, folks.

events.analyst: Market open. Theo watches the first 30 minutes before committing - the [indicator] decides which playbook is valid today.
events.commentator: KICKOFF! The bell rings and we're underway. Theo holds its shape for the first half hour - no wild lunges before the game shows its pattern.
